code_fixes_applied: hours_of_rest_handlers.py: Removed json.dumps from 5 JSONB columns (rest_periods, 3 signatures, schedule_template)
hours_of_rest_handlers.py: Strengthened 3 null guards on create_monthly_signoff
pipeline_service.py: CORS middleware moved to outermost (last add_middleware)
useEntityActions.ts: PARTS_ACTIONS.logUsage changed from log_part_usage to consume_part
PartsLensContent.tsx: Added new_quantity + reason to countStock payload
HoursOfRestLensContent.tsx: Renamed Verify Record to Update Record
ShoppingListLensContent.tsx: Error swallowing replaced with console.error
WarrantyLensContent.tsx: Fixed equipment_id to use data.equipment_id
docker-compose.yml: Added command override + master Supabase env vars
